html: Not in my experience, it tends to pick up subtle orientations given in a question (like "which is better, A and B?" and in the context you add you list a few things for A and B) and will absolutely run with them even if they're not true. Has been an issue with Gemini models since at least 3.0. Maybe that makes them great roleplaying models, but for factual information they just run with the slightest hint in one direction or another and never really push back objectively.
